creator: flz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 2006-07-19 at 13:10 +0200, Anders Nordby wrote:
 > 
 > Hi,
 > 
 > On Sun, Feb 19, 2006 at 05:56:39PM +0100, Matteo Riondato wrote:
 > >> So you think it's a good idea to have support for vnode mounts in
 > the
 > >> jail script? 
 > > Yes, I'm working on these, investigating about the best solution.
 > 
 > Ping? Anything happening with this PR?
 
 Didn't know about this PR.
 
 I think jail rc script is getting overly complex and such feature is
 already present in HEAD with mdconfig{,2} scripts. Please give them a
 try. I might MFC them for 6.2R if I get sufficient successful reports.
 
 -- 
 Florent Thoumie
 flz@FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Committer
